task_completion.description: Update acme-web container to have at least 1GB memory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of a command like 'docker update -m 1g acme-web' (or 1024m) in the terminal, or a 'docker inspect acme-web' output showing '"Memory": 1073741824'.

task_completion.description: Update acme-web container to have 2.0 CPUs
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of a command like 'docker update --cpus 2.0 acme-web' in the terminal, or a 'docker inspect acme-web' output showing '"NanoCpus": 2000000000'.

task_completion.description: Connect acme-db container to the admin-net network
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of the command 'docker network connect admin-net acme-db' in the terminal, or 'docker inspect acme-db' showing 'admin-net' under the 'Networks' section.

task_completion.description: Reload the acme-lb configuration without restarting the container
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the execution of a command like 'docker exec acme-lb nginx -s reload' or 'docker exec acme-lb kill -s HUP 1' in the terminal.

task_completion.description: Maintain 100% uptime by not restarting any containers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify that no 'docker restart <container>', 'docker stop', or 'docker start' commands were executed. A 'docker ps' output should show continuous 'Up' time for acme-web, acme-db, and acme-lb without resetting to 'Up Less than a second'.

integrity.description: Agent did not cheat by restarting containers to apply changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the terminal history to ensure 'docker restart', 'docker stop', or 'docker rm' were never used on acme-web, acme-db, or acme-lb.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a genuine terminal to execute Docker commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard shell prompts (e.g., bash, zsh) and authentic Docker CLI output formats, ensuring the agent didn't just type commands into a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof verification outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use 'echo' commands to print fake 'docker inspect' JSON outputs or fake success messages to trick the evaluation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Containers to fix: 'acme-web', 'acme-db', 'acme-lb'. Target memory for acme-web: 1GB (1,073,741,824 bytes). Target CPUs for acme-web: 2.0 (2000000000 NanoCpus). Target network for acme-db: 'admin-net'. The containers must NOT be restarted; the agent must use 'docker update' for resources, 'docker network connect' for networking, and 'docker exec <container> nginx -s reload' (or similar) for the load balancer config.
